year.rationale: Provides context for the research timeline.

abstract.rationale: Gives a brief overview of the research focus and findings.

doi.rationale: Unique identifier for locating the paper online.

venue.description: Conference or journal where the paper was published
venue.rationale: Indicates the context and audience for the research.

problem_statement.description: Description of the main problem addressed
problem_statement.rationale: Clarifies the research gap and motivation for the study.

methodology.description: Overview of the research methods used
methodology.rationale: Details the approach taken to address the problem.

survey_details.rationale: Provides context on data collection methods.

participants.rationale: Understanding the sample population is crucial for interpretation.

questions.description: List of topics covered in the survey
questions.rationale: Highlights the focus areas of the survey.

analysis_method.description: Type of analysis performed on survey data
analysis_method.rationale: Clarifies how the data was interpreted.

results.rationale: Summarizes the outcomes of the study.

barriers_identified.description: List of barriers to error analysis reported by participants
barriers_identified.rationale: Identifies challenges faced in the field.

enabling_factors.description: List of factors that could facilitate error analysis
enabling_factors.rationale: Highlights potential solutions to the identified barriers.

participant_feedback.description: General sentiment from participants regarding error analysis
participant_feedback.rationale: Provides insight into the community's view on the practice.

discussion.description: Interpretation of results and implications for the field
discussion.rationale: Contextualizes findings within broader research trends.

cultural_incentives.description: Discussion on the cultural aspects affecting error analysis adoption
cultural_incentives.rationale: Explores how community norms influence research practices.

future_directions.description: Proposed future research directions based on findings
future_directions.rationale: Suggests areas for further investigation and improvement.

reproducibility_metadata.description: Information supporting the reproducibility of the study
reproducibility_metadata.rationale: Ensures that others can replicate the research.

data_access.description: Link or reference to the data used in the study
data_access.rationale: Facilitates access to the underlying data.

code_access.description: Link or reference to the code used for analysis
code_access.rationale: Allows others to verify the analysis process.
